mapper.select: SELECT code FROM sys_common_type WHERE group_code = #{group} AND name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT common_id FROM sys_common_type WHERE group_code = #{group} AND name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_profile (user_id, persona_code, career_level_code, career_level_sel, desired_industry_code, desired_job_code) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{personaCode}, #{careerLevelCode}, #{careerLevelSel}, #{industryCode}, #{jobCode}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE persona_code = VALUES(persona_code), career_level_code = VALUES(career_level_code), career_level_sel = VALUES(career_level_sel), desired_industry_code = VALUES(desired_industry_code), desired_job_code = VALUES(desired_job_code)
INSERT INTO sys_user_desired_region (user_id, sido, sigungu) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{sido}, #{sigungu})
INSERT INTO sys_user_concern (user_id, persona_code, category, content) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{personaCode}, #{category}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_job_scrap SET is_target = 0 WHERE indvdl_user_sn = #{userSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_job_scrap (indvdl_user_sn, instt_user_sn, pblanc_sn, is_target) SELECT INDVDL_USER_SN, INSTT_USER_SN, PBLANC_SN, 1 FROM TN_INDVDL_PBLANC_SCRAP WHERE INDVDL_USER_SN = #{userSn} AND PBLANC_SN = #{pblancSn} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_target = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_career_growth_skill WHERE goal_id IN (SELECT goal_id FROM sys_career_growth_goal WHERE user_id = #{userSn})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_career_growth_goal (user_id, current_rank_code, current_years, current_duties, target_role, target_pay, eval_factor_code) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{rankCode}, #{years}, #{duties}, #{targetRole}, #{targetPay}, #{evalCode})
mapper.select: SELECT goal_id FROM sys_career_growth_goal WHERE user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY goal_id DESC LIMIT 1
